data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. INCREDIBLE has found some good form since relocating to the South Island, and he put the writing on the wall for an overdue win when finishing second as a warm favourite here a fortnight ago. He meets a field that could possibly be weaker than her last assignment, and he is the one to beat. 3. LIPPY finished on well enough for fifth in the same race as the top pick last time out, and he doesn't want the track to be too wet. Tina Comignaghi takes over from an apprentice, and that may be enough to see him win a race like this. 2. SINCERE drove through late from well back when finishing runner-up by a nose at Wingatui nearly 3 weeks ago. He won't have to improve by much to be going one better here. 7. ROCA MILE dropped down to BM60 here last time out and ran an improved race for fourth over an unsuitable 1400m. The step up to 2200m is the key here, and he is well worth including in all combinations. 4. ON THE RIVET ran his best race in some time when second last start. Include.","runners":[1,3,2,7,4],"exclusive":true}
